adminHome.title: Monolith Caviar Back Office
adminHome.intro: Inbound, stock, orders, allocation runs. Pick an area.

customers.title: Customer list
customers.intro: Read-only. Aggregated from synced orders — every customer with at least one order shows up here.
customers.empty: No customers yet. Click {action} above to import existing orders.

backfill.title: Pull existing customer history from Shopify
backfill.intro: Loads all orders (incl. already fulfilled ones) from Shopify — customer, email, note and order total. Idempotent: existing orders are merged, internal status (PACKED / SHIP …) is preserved. New orders going forward don't need this — the webhook brings customer info automatically.

queue.title: Picking queue
queue.intro: Express orders first, then by order date (oldest first).
queue.empty: No orders to pick. Nice day.

dhl.title: Create DHL label
dhl.intro: Creates a DHL parcel label (DE) directly via API. Once the label exists the order is automatically marked packed + shipped (stock decremented, fulfillment reported to Shopify).
dhl.notConfiguredHint: DHL is not configured yet. <link>In admin settings</link> add EKP number + sender address.

errors.weightRange: Weight in grams must be between 1 and 31500.
errors.codMissing: Cash-on-delivery amount is required. Enter the outstanding gross amount in EUR (e.g. 49.90).
errors.codOverLimit: Cash-on-delivery amount exceeds DHL limit of 3,500.00 EUR.
errors.configNotConfigured: DHL is not configured. Please add billing number + sender address in admin settings.
errors.configBillingMissing: Billing number (EKP) missing from DHL config.
errors.configCredentialsMissing: DHL business portal username/password missing from config.
errors.validationFailed: DHL rejected the shipment. Please check address / weight (see logs for details).
errors.noLabel: DHL responded but returned no label.
errors.codMissingAmount: NACHNAHME tag set but no outstanding amount on the order. Check the order in Shopify or re-sync.
errors.codMissingAccountRef: Cash-on-delivery account reference missing — set it under admin settings → DHL.
errors.codCurrency: Cash-on-delivery is only available in EUR.

finish.title: Packed + shipped
finish.intro: Atomically decrements stock, reports fulfillment and inventory back to Shopify, and closes the order.

alerts.wrongStatus: Order is in status {status}. Pack confirmation is only possible from PICKING.
